implementation_plan.overview: Decompose monolithic e2e/utils/helpers.ts into POM classes (e2e/pages/), restructure fixtures (e2e/fixtures/), replace 13 waitForTimeout calls with condition-based waits, and maintain backward compatibility via thin adapter layer.

steps.description: Create KeyboardHelper POM class with platform modifier caching
steps.rationale: Foundation class with no dependencies; caches modifier to eliminate redundant page.evaluate() calls

steps.description: Create TerminalPage POM class with waitForPrompt() replacing 6 waitForTimeout calls
steps.rationale: Standalone POM; eliminates the largest cluster of fixed waits (terminal PTY init)
Standalone POM; existing methods already use condition-based waits

steps.description: Create ProjectTreePage POM class for tree navigation
steps.rationale: Encapsulates tree interactions; openProject/openProjectViaUI remain standalone in helpers.ts due to ElectronApplication dependency

steps.description: Create MonacoPage POM class with KeyboardHelper dependency injection
steps.rationale: Depends on KeyboardHelper for shortcut operations; encapsulates editor state
Clean import path for all POM classes
FR-013: general-purpose IPC roundtrip wait helper

steps.description: Rewrite helpers.ts as backward-compatibility adapter with WeakMap caching
steps.rationale: NFR-001: all existing test imports continue working via namespace delegation to POM instances

steps.description: Create app fixtures (userDataDir, app, window) from existing fixtures.ts
steps.rationale: Foundation fixture layer; teardown uses closeApp() for robustness
FR-007/FR-008: test-scoped project isolation with settings override

steps.description: Create POM fixtures (keyboardHelper, terminalPage, monacoPage, mermaidPage, projectTreePage)
steps.rationale: FR-010: auto-instantiate POMs from window fixture
FR-009: declarative file-open setup eliminating common boilerplate

steps.description: Create composed fixture index with chained extensions
steps.rationale: Single import point for tests: import { test } from './fixtures'

steps.description: Update e2e/fixtures.ts to re-export from new fixture structure
steps.rationale: Backward compatibility for any code importing from e2e/fixtures

steps.description: Add KNOWN_WAIT annotations to setTimeout calls in teardown paths
steps.rationale: NFR-002: document remaining fixed waits as intentional (teardown-only)

steps.description: Replace 6 waitForTimeout calls in third-party-components.e2e.ts with condition-based waits
steps.rationale: NFR-002: eliminate all fixed waits in assertion paths
AC definition of done: documentation updated to reflect POM pattern

patterns_to_follow: Page Object Model with Page constructor injection
KNOWN_WAIT annotation convention for intentional fixed waits
patterns_to_avoid: Static/namespace helper patterns (being replaced by POM)
Module-level mutable state (replaced by instance fields)
Deep fixture chains without clear dependency ordering

file_changes.description: KeyboardHelper POM class with cached platform modifier
TerminalPage POM class with waitForPrompt() condition-based wait
MermaidPage POM class for diagram interactions
ProjectTreePage POM class for tree navigation
MonacoPage POM class with KeyboardHelper DI
Barrel export for all POM classes
Rewrite as thin backward-compat adapter delegating to POM classes via WeakMap
POM instance fixtures for all 5 classes
Composed test export merging all fixture sets
Re-export from new fixtures/ structure for backward compat
Replace 6 waitForTimeout calls with condition-based waits
Add KNOWN_WAIT annotations to setTimeout calls

key_scenarios: All 4 existing E2E tests pass without import modifications (AC-002)
waitForPrompt() resolves on shell prompt without setTimeout (AC-007)
Zero waitForTimeout in assertion paths after migration (AC-008)

risks.risk: waitForPrompt() unreliable in CI due to non-standard shell prompts
risks.mitigation: Configurable regex patterns + 10s timeout fallback; KNOWN_WAIT annotation if specific wait proves flaky

risks.risk: WeakMap adapter masks bugs with stale Page references
risks.mitigation: WeakMap keys are Page objects; GC'd when Page closes; each test gets fresh Page

risks.risk: Fixture chain too deep causing slow test startup
risks.mitigation: Worker-scoped userDataDir amortizes setup; test-scoped testProject is cheap (<10ms)

risks.risk: xterm DOM structure (.xterm-rows) changes in future updates
risks.mitigation: Pin xterm.js version; waitForPrompt uses accessibility layer that xterm maintains for screen readers

risks.risk: openProject/openProjectViaUI awkward in ProjectTreePage due to ElectronApplication dependency
risks.mitigation: Keep as standalone functions in helpers.ts; ProjectTreePage only has tree navigation methods

verification_criteria: npm run test:e2e passes with 0 failures across all 4 test files
e2e/pages/ contains 6 files: index.ts, keyboard.helper.ts, terminal.page.ts, monaco.page.ts, mermaid.page.ts, project-tree.page.ts
e2e/fixtures/ contains 5 files: index.ts, app.fixtures.ts, project.fixtures.ts, pom.fixtures.ts, editor.fixtures.ts
grep -rn 'waitForTimeout' e2e/ returns 0 matches in assertion paths
All imports from e2e/utils/helpers resolve correctly
POM classes composable in same test without conflicts
